sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ سَمِيرٌ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Samir je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْتَدِي مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَيَشْعُرُ بِقَلِيلٍ مِنَ التَّوَتُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i osjećao je malu nervozu.
sentences.translationEn: He was wearing formal clothes and feeling a little nervous.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَشَرَحَ مَهَارَاتِهِ الْتِّقَنِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Samouvjereno je odgovarao na pitanja i objasnio svoje tehničke vještine.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions confidently and explained his technical skills.

sentences.arabic: اِبْتَسَمَ الْمُدِيرُ لَهُ وَوَعَدَهُ بِالرَّدِّ فِي الْأُسْبُوعِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor mu se nasmiješio i obećao mu odgovor sljedeće sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: The manager smiled at him and promised to reply next week.
